articles.original_title: Lakers Summer League run comes to end with loss to Warriors
articles.summary: The Lakers lost just two times this summer. Unfortunately, the same team that handed them their first loss also gave them their final defeat. In the semifinals of the Las Vegas Summer League on Saturday, the Lakers fell to the Warriors, 92-88. Golden State handed LA a far more unceremonious loss to open the summer at […]
